name: ONEOK INC /NEW/
business: ONEOK provides midstream energy services including gathering, processing, fractionation, transportation, storage, and marine export of natural gas, NGLs, refined products, and crude oil. Its customers are primarily major and independent crude oil and natural gas producers, as well as downstream petrochemical, refining, and marketing companies, utilities, and other end users.
sellsTo: major and independent crude oil and natural gas producers

exposures.sentence: Growing demand from data centers and continued demand from local distribution companies, electric-generation facilities and large industrial companies position us well for capital projects and low-cost expansions to provide additional services to our customers when needed.

catalysts.event: Bighorn natural gas processing plant completion
catalysts.sentence: The Bighorn plant is supported by acreage dedications with long-term primarily fee-based contracts and is expected to be completed in mid-2027.

catalysts.event: Relocation of 150 MMcf/d processing plant to Permian Basin
catalysts.sentence: We are also relocating a 150 MMcf/d processing plant to the Permian Basin from North Texas, which will be completed in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Expansion of two existing Permian Basin facilities (110 MMcf/d incremental capacity)
catalysts.sentence: expanding two existing facilities in the Permian Basin, which will provide an incremental 110 MMcf/d of processing capacity and is expected to be completed in the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Texas City Logistics export terminal and MBTC Pipeline completion
catalysts.sentence: We expect to invest a total of approximately $1.0 billion into these projects, which are expected to be completed in early 2028.
We expect to invest a total of approximately $350 million into this project, which is expected to be completed in mid-2028.
This project is fully subscribed under long-term contracts and is expected to be completed in mid-2026.
